title: More Trees
description: This mod adds some new tree types as well as all the woodstuffs that come with them!
body:
Welcome to More Trees, this is a mod about adding more... well.... trees! I hope you enjoy!

More Trees is my second mod and I hope you enjoy it!

This mod adds some new trees. These currently include the new Jacaranda Tree, Darker Oak Tree, and the Aspen Tree!

This is currently a small mod, but I can assure you, it will get bigger!

Stay tuned, because there will be more!

-Initially uploaded to CurseForge-
